mechanics.excerpt: EQUIPMENT CLOTHING Just about every type of clothing character might wear can be found the table on 156, from casual clothes t0 work clothes with several pockets to hold tools ad odds ad ends two or more bedrooms full kitchen or kitchenette and bar: The largest encompass entire floors ad have private elevators and parking areas_ Base Officer / Enlisted Quarters Military personnel sometimes travel as part of Iarge unit, in which case they will either live in the field or bunk in common quarters Other times, they travel alone or with small detach- ment Every military base has specia transient quarters aside for this_ The type of billeting and service available are on par with standard hotel, though the rates are much less_ Only military personnee and their dependents may take advantage of BOQs or BEQs FOOD Characters will have to eat, and bars and restaurants also make good settings for meeting contacts.
